commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

ci: add type-check script and suppress S1128 for app pages

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Major data integrity fixes + invoice generation

Fixes:
- SQL injection: whitelist allowed field names in bulk update
- Service worker: never cache /api/ responses (was serving stale data)
- Sale creation: wrapped in single transaction (atomic)
- Undo sale: properly deletes sale record + resets items (was orphaning)
- Stale data: all tabs refresh via refreshKey when navigated to
- Delete auction: requires confirmation dialog
- Safe area: StorageView floating bar + HomeFeed FAB respect iOS safe area
- Loading state: AuctionDetail shows spinner while loading

New features:
- Invoice generation: tap file icon on any sale to generate printable invoice
- DELETE /api/sales/:id endpoint for proper sale reversal
- GET /api/invoices/:saleId endpoint for invoice data

commit.message:
perf(admin-bookings): parallelize Momence enrichment to avoid Vercel timeout

Sequential API calls (30+ requests × ~300ms each) were timing out on
Vercel. Now all session-booking fetches and email lookups run in
parallel using Promise.allSettled, reducing total time from ~10-15s
to ~1-2s.

commit.message:
[SPRINT-28] Content Calendar Agent (#12) — full backend pipeline + frontend integration

2-agent pipeline (Strategist → Writer) for 30-day LinkedIn content calendar generation.
Strategist: analyze_expertise, identify_themes, map_audience_interests, plan_content_mix.
Writer: write_post, craft_hook, add_hashtags, schedule_post, assemble_calendar.
8 content strategy knowledge rules (philosophy, content mix, hooks, structure, hashtags, schedule, engagement, self-review).
7 content types with labels. ProductConfig, feature flag, route, SSE hook, ContentCalendarRoom UI.
48 tests (36 server + 12 app). Server: 1,123 passing. App: 695 passing. tsc clean.

commit.message:
Add comprehensive PZP documentation foundation

Phase 1 of documentation expansion (268K word target):

Business Case (3 documents, ~6,500 words):
- Market landscape with complete statistics
- Problem statement (zero-click crisis, token waste)
- Index and overview

Specification (4 documents, ~8,000 words):
- Terminology (RFC 2119 keywords, PZP terms)
- Architecture (three-layer protocol model)
- Discovery mechanisms (robots.txt, DNS, HTML)
- Specification index

Quick Start (2 documents, ~2,500 words):
- Index with getting started overview
- 5-minute minimal setup guide

Use Cases - E-commerce (2 documents, ~4,500 words):
- E-commerce overview and patterns
- Complete example with all files

Human Site:
- Statistics page with data visualization
- All key metrics from research

commit.message:
fix: upgrade calendar scope from readonly to read/write in OAuth setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add width field to ShopLayout schema, remove animation enum restriction

Mongoose was silently stripping the width field on save because it
wasn't in the schema. Also removed the strict enum on animation so
new effects (spin, bounce, rainbow, shake, zoom, orbit) can be saved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Upload media to Meta via Exotel resumable upload before template submission

Media headers (image/video/document) now go through a 2-step process:
1. Create upload session with Exotel to get a session ID
2. Upload the media bytes to get a Meta media handle
3. Use the handle in the template's header_handle field

Previously we passed a Supabase Storage URL directly which Meta rejected
with error 1003 "header_handle not provided".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: pixel visualization & generative asset engine

- Palette engine: 10 named presets (cyberpunk, forest, desert, arctic,
  ocean, volcano, neon, monochrome, pastel, default) with environment
  colors, avatar tints, and outfit overrides. New color utilities:
  saturate(), hueShift(), tint() with HSL conversion.
- Sprite variant generator: generate-variants.js produces themed sprite
  sheets per role × preset; generate-tile-variants.js for tilesets;
  post-process-assets.sh for optional ImageMagick upscale/WebP.
- WFC procedural map generation: @autoswarm/map-gen package with
  WFCGrid (observe/collapse/propagate/backtracking), adjacency rules,
  constraint validation, and TMJ writer. CLI via generate-map.js.
  BootScene supports ?map=<name> URL parameter.
- Pixelact UI: scoped .pixelact namespace with 3D press effects,
  PixelButton (5 variants × 3 sizes) and PixelInput components.
  shadcn components.json configured with Pixelact registry.
- Tileset preview tool: generates HTML catalog of all tiles × presets.
- 93 new tests (343 TS total), all passing. Zero new dependencies.

Install Labs v2.0.0 — Claude Code plugin for agent packaging

Complete rewrite from raw research guide to production Claude Code plugin.

12 skills (6,900+ lines):
- agent-packaging-foundations, mcp-server-packaging, claude-code-plugin-packaging
- custom-gpt-packaging, docker-agent-packaging, pypi-agent-packaging
- npm-agent-packaging, framework-packaging-guides (17 frameworks)
- agent-security, agent-update-distribution, agent-install-templates
- agent-pre-ship-checklist (39-item quality gate)

10 commands across 3 phases:
- ASSESS: /agent-guide, /agent-audit
- PACKAGE: /pick-target, /pick-framework, /gen-package
- SHIP: /gen-install, /pre-ship, /secure
- Standalone: /agent-roast, /glossary

17 frameworks: LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Pydantic AI, LlamaIndex,
Semantic Kernel, Vercel AI SDK, OpenAI Assistants, Anthropic Tool Use,
Smolagents, n8n, Flowise, Dify, ComfyUI, Playwright, Puppeteer, custom.

10 distribution targets: MCP Server (npm/PyPI), Claude Code Plugin,
Custom GPT, Docker, PyPI, npm, HuggingFace, Replicate, Cloud Deploy.

Academic foundations: Cognitive Load Theory (Sweller 1988), Fogg Behavior
Model, Hick's Law, Nielsen heuristics, Twelve-Factor App, OWASP, SLSA.
115 references in REFERENCES.md. All skills cite official documentation.

11,211 total lines across 28 files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Transform into multi-room editorial art experience

Expand from single-room 3-painting gallery to 5-chapter immersive
experience: Gallery → Hallway → Studio → Portal → Infinite → Finale.

- Add 3 essay sections: "The Act of Looking", "AI Doesn't Replace
  the Artist", "Art Is Not a Category"
- Build hallway corridor (z=-14 to z=-26) with dramatic vignette
- Build Studio room (z=-26 to z=-42) with work table, easel,
  paint splotches, and cool lavender palette
- Build Portal with ornate frame, particle burst (200 particles),
  and CSS brightness flash transition
- Build Infinite room (z=-45 to z=-85) with 5 floating paintings,
  500 star particles, and dark void aesthetic
- Extend camera choreography from 6 to 20 acts
- Add CSS vignette overlay driven by proxy object
- Add navigation color shifts per room (warm → cool → dark → warm)
- Expand progress dots with room dividers (13 sections)
- Add easter eggs: type FRAME for wireframe, triple-click essay
  for hidden artist note
- Mobile: reduce stars 500→150, dust 40→20, shorter section heights
- Update finale with "Now You See." signature, Portfolio + ML Universe links

commit.message:
Research: extend CLT, Fourier series with new theorems (#3397)

* research: extend yang-mills with OS axioms, beta function, spectral gap theory

- Part XXXIII: Osterwalder-Schrader framework (Euclidean QFT axioms, Schwinger functions,
  reflection positivity, time reflection involution, mass gap from exponential decay)
- Part XXXIV: Asymptotic freedom and beta function (β₀=11N/3, running coupling,
  asymptotic freedom theorem, Λ_QCD scale, trace anomaly)
- Part XXXV: Spectral gap and correlation length (ξ=1/Δ, Källén-Lehmann spectral
  representation, lattice correlation length, continuum limit growth)
- Also proves slowlyVarying_rpow in CLT (converts axiom → theorem)
- 268 defs/theorems, 0 sorries, 2866 lines total

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* research: update yang-mills knowledge (OS axioms, beta function, spectral gap)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* research: extend CLT with SV division, asymptotic equiv, RV inverse/quotient

- slowlyVarying_div: quotient of slowly varying functions is slowly varying
- slowlyVarying_of_asymp_equiv: asymptotic equivalence preserves slow variation
- slowlyVarying_pow: integer powers of slowly varying functions
- regularlyVarying_inv_index: reciprocal negates the index
- regularlyVarying_div_index: quotient subtracts indices
- 40 defs/theorems, 0 sorries, 667 lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* research: update CLT knowledge (SV/RV extensions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* research: extend Fourier series with Fejér kernel, Bessel inequality, Parseval theorem

- Part XI: Fejér kernel and Cesàro summability (kernel def, continuity, Fejér's theorem)
- Part XII: Bessel inequality, Parseval theorem, Fourier uniqueness theorem
- Proved: Fourier uniqueness from Parseval (if all coefficients = 0 then ‖f‖₂ = 0)
- 45 defs/theorems (was 28), 2 sorries, 653 lines (was 442)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* research: update fourier-series knowledge (Fejér, Parseval)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* research: prove 3/4 sorries in BorsukUlamOQ03OQ03 (Tucker→BU bridge)

Proved approx_pair_small_diff (antisymmetricDiff ↔ dist),
approx_to_exact (compact S¹ minimization argument), and
borsuk_ulam_2d_from_tucker (chains approx + compactness).
1 sorry remains: explicit triangulation construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: kc_api_create curl timeout (exit 28) crash under set -e

curl exit code 28 (timeout) killed the script before the case
statement could handle it. Added || true to tolerate non-zero
curl exit codes, and handle empty http_code same as 000.

commit.message:
Smart grocery list merging and enhanced cross-off UX

Grocery list:
- Add unit normalization (cloves→clove, tablespoons→tbsp) and cross-unit
  conversion (tsp+tbsp merge via common base) so duplicate ingredients
  are properly combined
- Add "to taste" absorption — entries without quantities merge into
  quantified entries for the same ingredient
- Add sticky progress bar, per-store progress, "Check All" per category,
  and optimistic updates for snappy checkbox toggling
- Add batch toggle API endpoint for bulk check/uncheck
- Add 29 unit and integration tests for merging logic

Meal plan:
- Add preferences (cuisine, dietary restrictions) with settings drawer
- Add multi-slot-per-day support with updated schema migrations
- Update plan generator, slots API, and meal plan page UI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Prometheus metrics endpoint with HTTP and pipeline instrumentation

- PrometheusMiddleware records request latency, count, and active
  connections with low-cardinality labels (method, route template, status)
- Pipeline timing context manager tracks step durations and errors
- Histogram buckets tuned per bead spec: 10ms-5s for HTTP, 1s-600s for pipeline
- /metrics endpoint serves Prometheus exposition format
- 15 tests covering middleware, pipeline metrics, and bucket boundaries
